name: Sun Dried Tomato & Herb Cheese Strudels
recipeIngredient: 9 oz Soft fresh goat cheese - room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, stir together the softened goat cheese and cream cheese until smooth.
2. Season the filling with pepper to taste.
3. Place one phyllo sheet on a work surface (keep the remaining sheets covered). Brush lightly with oil and season with pepper.
4. Top with another phyllo sheet, brush lightly with oil, and season with pepper again.
5. Repeat with a third phyllo sheet.
6. Fold the stacked phyllo in half lengthwise, brush the top with oil, and spoon about 1/4 of the filling into a log along one long side of the sheet, leaving a 1-inch border on each end.
7. Fold each short end over the filling, brush the edges with oil, press to seal the seam, and wrap the strudel tightly in plastic, making sure the seam is facing down.
8. Repeat with the remaining phyllo sheets and filling, forming a total of 4 strudels.
9. (Can be prepared up to 2 days ahead.)
10. Preheat the oven to 375°F. Lightly oil cookie sheets.
11. Place the strudels on the prepared sheets, seam sides down.
12. Using a serrated knife, score each strudel by making 14 diagonal cuts through only the phyllo layers.
13. Brush the strudels with oil and bake until golden, about 15 minutes.
14. Let cool for 10 minutes before cutting along the score lines to form slices.
15. Arrange the cut sides up on a platter and garnish with diced tomato and fresh oregano sprigs.
